product: Email notifications for expiring service principal tokens (Beta) ​
tagline: June 12, 2026 Databricks now automatically sends email notifications to workspace admins when a service principal token is within seven days of expiring.
what_it_does: June 12, 2026 Databricks now automatically sends email notifications to workspace admins when a service principal token is within seven days of expiring. This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
